languages.text: "Мы стоим ногами на Патенте. Нам потребуется снять кожу со стоп своих, сделать из нее печати чистоты и носить их, пока не затянутся раны!" {n}В глазах и голосе Инцендии полыхает пламя.{/n}
"We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мы стоим ногами на Патенте. Нам потребуется снять кожу со стоп своих, сделать из нее печати чистоты и носить их, пока не затянутся раны!" {n}В глазах и голосе Инцендии полыхает пламя.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}
"We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}
"We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}

languages.text: 「我らの足は証書に触れた。我らの足は剥ぎ、その皮で清浄の印を作り、傷が治るまで身につけよ！」{n}火の玉のような眼と声で、インセンディアは叫んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「我らの足は証書に触れた。我らの足は剥ぎ、その皮で清浄の印を作り、傷が治るまで身につけよ！」{n}火の玉のような眼と声で、インセンディアは叫んだ。{/n}

languages.text: «Hemos permitido que nuestros pies toquen la Patente. ¡Debemos desollarlos, crear sellos de pureza con la piel y llevarlos hasta que se curen las heridas!». {n}La mirada y la voz de Incendia están ardiendo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Hemos permitido que nuestros pies toquen la Patente. ¡Debemos desollarlos, crear sellos de pureza con la piel y llevarlos hasta que se curen las heridas!». {n}La mirada y la voz de Incendia están ardiendo.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir haben unseren Füßen erlaubt, den Handelsbrief zu berühren. Wir müssen unsere Füße häuten, aus der Haut Reinheitssiegel anfertigen und diese tragen, bis unsere Wunden verheilen!" {n}In Incendias Augen scheint ein Feuer zu lodern.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben unseren Füßen erlaubt, den Handelsbrief zu berühren. Wir müssen unsere Füße häuten, aus der Haut Reinheitssiegel anfertigen und diese tragen, bis unsere Wunden verheilen!" {n}In Incendias Augen scheint ein Feuer zu lodern.{/n}

languages.text: « Nos pieds ont foulé la lettre. Nous devons à présent les écorcher, nous servir de cette peau pour façonner des sceaux de pureté et les porter jusqu'à ce que nos blessures soient cicatrisées ! » {n}déclare Argenta, dont la voix et le regard flamboient d'une rage à peine contenue.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Nos pieds ont foulé la lettre. Nous devons à présent les écorcher, nous servir de cette peau pour façonner des sceaux de pureté et les porter jusqu'à ce que nos blessures soient cicatrisées ! » {n}déclare Argenta, dont la voix et le regard flamboient d'une rage à peine contenue.{/n}

languages.text: “我们的双足竟然触碰了贸易授状。必须剥下我们脚上的皮肤，制成纯洁印记，并佩戴至伤口痊愈为止！”{n}因森蒂娅的双眼与声音中燃烧着炽烈的火焰。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我们的双足竟然触碰了贸易授状。必须剥下我们脚上的皮肤，制成纯洁印记，并佩戴至伤口痊愈为止！”{n}因森蒂娅的双眼与声音中燃烧着炽烈的火焰。{/n}

languages.text: "Ayaklarımızın Ruhsatname'ye değmesine izin verdik. Ayaklarımızın derisini yüzmeli, deriden saflık mühürleri yapmalı ve yaralarımız iyileşene kadar onları takmalıyız!" {n}İncendia'nın gözlerinde ve sesinde ateş parlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have allowed our feet to touch the Warrant. We must flay our feet, make purity seals from the skin, and wear them until our wounds heal!" {n}Fire blazes in Incendia's eyes and voice.{/n}
